decisions.summary: No beads existed for PAN-965 — created 8 beads from PRD phases and linked dependencies.
Container status mapping: running→active, unhealthy→waiting, restarting→thinking, stopped→ended. Reuses StatusDot component.
Moved containerStats polling effect after projectsWithSessions declaration to fix React initialization order bug.

hazards.summary: Large CSS file (4396 lines) — append new styles at end to avoid conflicts.
hazards.mitigation: Use Edit with tail context, not offset-based insertion.

hazards.summary: FeatureItem.tsx is 1234 lines — risk of merge conflicts during rebase.
hazards.mitigation: Keep changes localized to render output section and props.

resumePoint.description: All beads complete. Tests pass. Branch pushed. Ready for pan done.

sessionHistory.note: Created beads, continue.json, and started implementation of PAN-965.
Resolved merge conflict with origin/main in .pan/continue.json. All tests pass. Ready for pan done.

Implement Command Deck hierarchical resource tree (PAN-965): InlineSparkline, ContainerNode, BranchNode, PrNode, ResourcesGroup components with localStorage persistence, FeatureItem integration, container stats polling (5s), server endpoints for restart/start/logs, parseContainerServiceName utility with tests, and CSS styling. All 4417 tests pass.
